Class AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.async.AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder
public class AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder extends Object
Builds an async cross-table batch get operation to retrieve items from multiple tables.

Obtain via AsyncDynamoSimplifiedClient.batchGet(). Uses the low-level DynamoDbAsyncClient.batchGetItem(BatchGetItemRequest) which returns a CompletableFuture, avoiding the reactive publisher model.

    • addKey

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKey(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition key from the given async table.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to read from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKey

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKey(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @NonNull Object sortKey)
      Adds a key to retrieve by partition and sort key from the given async table.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to read from
      partitionKey - the partition key value
      sortKey - the sort key value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addKeys

      public <T> @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder addKeys(@NonNull AsyncTable<T> table, @NonNull Collection<?> partitionKeys)
      Adds multiple partition keys from the given async table at once.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the item type
      Parameters:
      table - the typed async table to read from
      partitionKeys - the partition key values
      Returns:
      this builder

    • project

      public @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder project(@NonNull String... attributes)
      Restricts the returned attributes for the most recently added entry to the specified attribute names.
      Parameters:
      attributes - the attribute names to include
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no entries have been added yet

    • project

      public @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder project(@NonNull Consumer<ProjectionExpression> consumer)
      Restricts the returned attributes for the most recently added entry using a ProjectionExpression builder consumer.
      Parameters:
      consumer - a consumer to configure the projection expression
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no entries have been added yet

    • returnConsumedCapacity

      public @NonNull AsyncCrossTableBatchGetBuilder returnConsumedCapacity(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnConsumedCapacity returnConsumedCapacity)
      Configures whether to return consumed capacity information for the operation.
      Parameters:
      returnConsumedCapacity - the consumed capacity reporting level
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<CrossTableBatchGetResult> execute()
      Executes the batch get operation asynchronously.

      Groups entries by table name and calls the low-level DynamoDB API.

      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the CrossTableBatchGetResult
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if more than 100 keys are provided
